steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what benefit the passage says visiting the museum provides to visitors.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It is superior to most museums dedicated to Wilder's life.: The passage makes no comparison to other museums. ✗
  • Choice B — It helps visitors to appreciate Wilder's works.: The passage explicitly states guided tours and special events help visitors “find enjoyment in Wilder's works” — directly matching this claim. ✓
  • Choice C — It includes exhibits on several important American writers.: No other writers are mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — It is near other museums dedicated to local history.: The passage says nothing about proximity to other museums. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
